steps.title: Join two complete clauses
steps.content: The first independent clause ends after the site with the highest elevation. The next clause, it had shifted to 16.2°C by 8:30 p.m., is also independent. They need a comma plus a coordinating conjunction.

steps.title: Reject run-ons and splices
steps.content: Choice A leaves no punctuation or conjunction between the clauses. Choice C uses and without the needed comma. Choice D uses only a comma, creating a comma splice. The comma-plus-and form works. The answer is B.
